properties.title: Magyar rendőrök is részt vesznek egy nők bedrogozására és megerőszakolására szakosodott nemzetközi online hálózat felszámolásában
properties.summary: Európai nyomozók egy olyan hálózatra bukkantak, amelynek tagjai online csevegőszobákban cserélnek tapasztalatot, képeket és videókat a szexuális bántalmazásokról.

properties.title: Monacói otthona előtt hajtottak végre merényletet a szankcionált ukrán oligarcha ellen
properties.summary: A támadásban Vadim Jermolajev súlyosan megsérült, feleségének amputálni kellett a lábát.

properties.summary: A bíróság a törvény szabályait megtartva, együttműködően és segítően járt el.

properties.title: Ahol kultúrának számoljuk el a disznóvágást, ott baj van
properties.summary: Nagy Ervin kultúráért felelős államtitkár is részt vett a Telex After Fishing on Orfűn tartott beszélgetésén, ahol a Tisza Párt kultúrprogramjáról, és arról is beszélt, hogy az országban az emberek lelkében léteztek a feketelisták, a tehetség mégis utat tört magának.

properties.title: Űrinternet otthonra: vége a Starlink egyeduralmának, műholdas internettel jön az Amazon is
properties.summary: Rajtra kész az Amazon Leo, amely a jövőben komoly riválisa lehet az Elon Musk-féle Starlinknek.

properties.title: Óriási Tisza-fölényt mér a 21 Kutatóközpont is, a Fidesz-tábor zuhanása megállt
properties.summary: Kétharmados támogatottságot mért a Tiszának a pártválasztók körében június végi kutatásában a 21 Kutatóközpont is, hasonlóan a Mediánhoz, amely Tisza-eufóriáról számolt be friss mérésében.

properties.title: Dezastru ecologic pe lacul Corbu din Constanța: mii de pești au murit
properties.summary: Un dezastru ecologic a avut loc pe lacul Corbu din județul Constanța: mii de pești au fost găsiți morți. Estimările indică până la două tone de pește mort. Autoritățile fac verificări.

properties.title: Prima reacție a Maiei Sandu după ce Alexandru Munteanu și-a dat demisia din fruntea Guvenului: „Am așteptat mai multă implicare”
properties.summary: Președintele Republicii Moldova, Maia Sandu, a venit cu o primă reacție după ce premierul de peste Prut și-a anunțat intempestiv demisia din fruntea Executivului de la Chișinău. Șefa statului a declarat că aștepta mai multă fermitate în deciziile pe care ar fi trebuit să le ia Alexandru Munteanu.

properties.title: Explozie la Năvodari: un angajat de la o fabrică de mase plastice a fost rănit în deflagrație
properties.summary: O explozie s-a produs, vineri, la o fabrică de mase plastice din Năvodari, iar în urma deflagraţiei un bărbat de 48 de ani a fost rănit, suferind traumatisme şi escoriaţii la nivelul feţei.

properties.title: Alexandru Munteanu, premierul Republicii Moldova, și-a dat demisia după doar opt luni de mandat. Cum își motivează gestul
properties.summary: Premierul Moldovei, Alexandru Munteanu, și-a anunțat astăzi demisia. Decizia a fost făcută public astăzi, după o întrevedere pe care premierul ar fi avut-o cu președinta Maia Sandu, susțin sursele NewsMaker. Demisia vine la scurt timp după scandalul de la întreprinderea de stat MoldATSA, care a provocat un val de demisii în instituțiile statului.

properties.title: Salvare miraculoasă. Un bărbat din Venezuela a supraviețuit 8 zile sub dărâmăturile de după cutremur
properties.summary: Echipele de intervenție de urgență au reușit să-l salveze pe Hernán Gil la mai mult de 100 de ore după ce l-au localizat pentru prima dată sub 140 de tone de moloz, relatează BBC. Bărbatul, în vârstă de 43 de ani, a supraviețuit 8 zile sub dărâmături înainte de a fi salvat. Președinta interimară a …

properties.title: VIDEO Prim-ministrul Republicii Moldova a demisionat după opt luni de mandat și face acuzații. Maia Sandu răspunde: „A avut mână liberă să conducă guvernul. El a ales să plece”
properties.summary: Guvernul de la Chișinău a căzut vineri. Executivul premierului Alexandru Munteanu fusese numit în funcție pe 31 octombrie, după victorie electorală a Partidului Acțiune și Solidaritate (PAS), al președintei Maia Sandu. HotNews transmite în format LIVE TEXT principalele informații din criza politică declanșată la Chișinău: Alexandru Munteanu va rămâne să exercite funcția de prim-ministru interimar …

properties.title: O biserică veche de peste 300 de ani din Maramureş, făcută scrum după un incendiu puternic
properties.summary: Biserica din lemn din satul Posta, monument istoric, a fost distrusă în întregime în urma unui incendiu izbucnit în noaptea de joi spre vineri, a anunțat ISU Maramureş, citat de site-ul local Vasiledale. Biserica de lemn „Sfântul Ilie” din localitatea Posta era monument istoric, categoria A, și datează din anul 1675, a anunțat Episcopia Ortodoxă …

properties.title: Europa Liberă: Premierul Republicii Moldova, Alexandru Munteanu, și-a anunțat demisia / Mesajul, transmis pe rețelele de socializare
properties.summary:
Premierul Republicii Moldova, Alexandru Munteanu, a anunțat vineri, 3 iulie, că demisionează din funcție, transmite Europa Liberă Moldova. „Azi îmi închei mandatul de prim-ministru”, a transmis Alexandru Munteanu, într-o postare pe rețelele sociale. El a precizat că pleacă deoarece „am înțeles că nu-mi mai pot exercita mandatul în acord cu principiile și convingerile pe care […]

© G4Media.ro.

properties.title: Şoc politic în Republica Moldova. Premierul a demisionat (UPDATE)
properties.summary: Premierul Alexandru Munteanu a anunţat că demisionează deoarece a înţeles că " nu mai poate exercita mandatul în acord cu principiile și convingerile pe care le are".

properties.title: BCE respinge solicitările de a reduce cerinţele privind capitalul impuse băncilor
properties.summary: Banca Centrală Europeană (BCE) a respins solicitările industriei de reducere a cerinţelor privind capitalul, argumentând că actualele cerinţe sunt necesare pentru siguranţă şi nu constrâng creditarea, transmite Reuters.

properties.title: Pogačar proti zvyšku sveta. Začína sa Tour de France, už prvá etapa sľubuje unikátny zážitok
properties.summary: Tour de France odštartuje už v sobotu, začína sa v španielskej Barcelone a hneď úvodná etapa bude dôležitá pre celkové poradie.

properties.title: Moldavský premiér Alexandru Munteanu v piatok nečakane oznámil svoju rezignáciu
properties.summary: Náhly koniec moldavského kabinetu prichádza po necelých ôsmich mesiacoch od jeho sformovania. Predseda vlády Alexandru Munteanu demisiou na sieti X uvrhol krajinu do politickej neistoty.

properties.title: Moldavský premiér překvapivě oznámil rezignaci, důvod neupřesnil, píše Reuters
properties.summary: Moldavský premiér Alexandru Munteanu v pátek překvapivě oznámil rezignaci, v čele vlády byl od loňského listopadu. Jeho odstoupení znamená pád celé vlády. Premiér neupřesnil, proč se takto rozhodl, uvedla agentura Reuters.

properties.title: Moldavský premiér překvapivě rezignoval
properties.summary: Moldavský premiér Alexandru Munteanu rezignoval. Informovala o tom tamní stanice LiberTV, podle níž to odůvodnil tím, že současná politická situace mu neumožňuje pokračovat v činnosti v souladu s jeho hodnotami. Agentura Reuters jeho rezignaci označila za překvapivou. Jeho odstoupení znamená pád celé vlády.

properties.title: Sinice w Bałtyku. 11 kąpielisk zamkniętych
properties.summary: Ze względu na zakwit sinic w czwartek, 2 lipca, zamknięto 11 nadmorskich kąpielisk - w Sopocie i Gdańsku. Kąpiel w zanieczyszczonej sinicami wodzie może spowodować niekorzystne reakcje organizmu

properties.title: Południe kraju w ogniu. Ranni, ewakuacja tysięcy osób
properties.summary: Pożary trawią południową Francję. W piątek w sześciu departamentach występuje bardzo wysokie zagrożenie pożarowe. W kilku miejscach trwa walka z ogniem - w czwartek konieczne były liczne ewakuacje. Kilkanaście osób zostało lekko rannych.

properties.title: Vilniaus programėlė „Kovas“ nuo šiol siųs saugumo pranešimus anglų, lenkų bei ukrainiečių kalbomis
properties.summary: Mobilioji programėlė „Kovas“, skirta pranešti apie ekstremalias situacijas bei svarbius įvykius Vilniuje, nuo šiol pranešimus siųs ne tik lietuvių, bet ir anglų, lenkų bei ukrainiečių kalbomis, penktadienį pranešė Vilniaus miesto savivaldybė.

properties.title: Karinius laivus Klaipėdoje siekianti gaminti „Naval Group“ pasirašė ketinimų protokolą su Lietuvos mokslo įstaigomis
properties.summary: Prancūzijos gynybos bendrovė „Naval Group“ kartu su Kauno technologijos universitetu (KTU), Klaipėdos universitetu, Baltijos pažangių technologijų institutu (BPTI) ir Fizinių ir technologijos mokslų centru (FTMC) pasirašė bendrą ketinimų protokolą, kuriuo pradėtas „SHIELD Lab“ jūrinių gynybos inovacijų laboratorijos kūrimo etapas.

properties.title: Monako identificēts aizdomās turētais par sprādziena īstenošanu oligarha mājā
properties.summary: Monako varas iestādes ir identificējušas aizdomās turēto spridzekļa eksplozijā, kurā tika ievainots Ukrainā dzimis multimiljonārs Vadims Jermolajevs un vēl divi cilvēki, ceturtdien paziņoja firstistes prokuratūra.

properties.title: Digitālā cīņa par vēlētāju: Kā Moldovai izdevās «nesalūzt» parlamenta vēlēšanās
properties.summary: Vēlēšanu iznākumu mūsdienās nosaka ne tikai debates, reklāmas plakāti un tikšanās ar vēlētājiem. Arvien lielāka loma ir digitālajām tehnoloģijām. Informācijas ietekmes kampaņas tika izvērstas arī pirms pagājušajā gadā notikušajām vēlēšanām Moldovā. Reti kura Eiropas valsts ir pieredzējusi tik daudzveidīgas un plaša mēroga ietekmes operācijas kā Moldova, tomēr tai ir izdevies "nesalūzt".

properties.title: PTAC bloķē piekļuvi vietnei "marta-riga.com"
properties.summary: Patērētāju tiesību aizsardzības centrs (PTAC) pieņēmis lēmumu bloķēt piekļuvi interneta vietnei "marta-riga.com", jo tās īstenotajā komercpraksē konstatēti būtiski patērētāju tiesību pārkāpumi, un tās turpmāka pieejamība rada nozīmīgu risku Latvijas patērētāju kolektīvajām interesēm, aģentūru LETA informēja PTAC.

properties.title: FOTO ⟩ 100 mākslinieki, 40 galerijas, 15 valstis – atklāta starptautiskā laikmetīgās mākslas mese "Riga Contemporary"
properties.summary: No 2. līdz 5. jūlijam Rīgā, "Hanzas peronā", norisinās starptautiskā laikmetīgās mākslas mese "Riga Contemporary", ko sadarbībā ar Rīgas valstspilsētas pašvaldību organizē Laikmetīgās mākslas centrs Kim?. Otro gadu pēc kārtas mese pulcē vadošās galerijas, māksliniekus, kolekcionārus un nozares profesionāļus no visas pasaules.

properties.title: Hacker remained undetected in “Latvijas valsts meži” system for several days
properties.summary:
A hacker had gained access to the IT systems of Latvia’s state-owned forestry company “Latvijas valsts meži” (LVM) as early as 11 June but only began carrying out active operations during the night of 22–23 June, Prime Minister Andris Kulbergs told journalists on Thursday following a Cabinet meeting on the cyberattack. However, the hacker remained […]

properties.title: What Was Leaked After the Cyberattack on Latvijas valsts meži? Cert.lv Explains
properties.summary:
So far, the attacker has leaked 44 gigabytes of data stolen during the cyberattack on Latvijas valsts meži (LVM), although the total volume of data potentially obtained is likely to be much larger, according to Latvia’s national cybersecurity incident response institution, Cert.lv. According to the institution, the leaked data mainly consists of internal documents, email […]

properties.title: Electrician in Latvia sentenced to five and a half years in prison for spying for Russia
properties.summary:
A Riga City Court has sentenced an electrician to five years and six months in prison for spying on behalf of Russia’s military intelligence agency (GRU). The court also imposed one year and eight months of probation supervision following his release, without confiscation of property, the LETA news agency has learned. According to the prosecution, […]

properties.title: Rosļikovs, wanted by authorities, to run in Latvia’s 15th Saeima elections
properties.summary:
The leaders of the For Stability! party’s candidate lists for Latvia’s 15th Saeima elections will be Svetlana Čulkova, Pāvels Kuzmins, Natālija Marčenko-Jodko, Ludmila Rjazanova, and Igors Orlovs, according to the LETA news agency. Čulkova, who leads the dissolved For Stability! parliamentary group, will head the party’s list in the Riga constituency. Running second on the […]

properties.title: Cyberattack on Latvia’s state forests company highlights national cybersecurity risks, minister warns
properties.summary:
The recent cyberattack on Latvijas valsts meži (LVM), in which a hacker managed to breach the company’s IT systems and gain control over data, demonstrates that Latvia’s strategic infrastructure remains relatively vulnerable to such attacks, Minister for Smart Administration and Regional Development Edgars Tavars said in an interview with TV3 on Friday. The minister called […]

properties.title: Forecasters predict tropical nights and temperatures of up to thirty-five degrees in Latvia
properties.summary:
Some eastern parts of Latvia may see light rain on Friday, while light northerly winds will prevail across most of the country, according to the Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre. Daytime temperatures will rise to 22–27°C, while areas along the Gulf of Riga coast will remain a few degrees cooler. Over the weekend and […]

The post Forecasters predict tropical nights and temperatures of up to thirty-five degrees in Latvia appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Most Riga city council leaders see popularity decline as new poll reveals shifting ratings
properties.summary:
Most members of Riga City Council’s leadership saw their public approval ratings decline during the first half of this year, according to the latest survey conducted by research company SKDS on behalf of the Riga City Council. Only three politicians improved their popularity in May compared with November last year. The sharpest decline was recorded […]

The post Most Riga city council leaders see popularity decline as new poll reveals shifting ratings appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Ukrainian drone strikes ignite another oil depot in Russia
properties.summary:
Another oil depot has caught fire in Russia’s Krasnodar region following overnight Ukrainian drone strikes, according to Russian and Ukrainian media reports. The Ukrainian Telegram channel Exilenova+ reported that three fuel storage tanks caught fire at the oil depot in the village of Poltavskaya after the attack. According to the Telegram channel Astra, the Poltavskaya […]

The post Ukrainian drone strikes ignite another oil depot in Russia appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Progress made on Tapa-Tartu electrification, though Valga line will have to wait
properties.summary: Despite being behind schedule, work is ongoing to electrify a stretch of rail line between Tartu and Tapa.

properties.title: Record number of applications filed for university programs
properties.summary: Several Estonian universities saw a substantial surge in applications this year. More than 15,000 people applied to Estonian‑language programs at the University of Tartu.

properties.title: Estonian cheesemaker Andre Farm pulls out of major supermarket chains
properties.summary: Andre Farm, a cheesemaker based in Tartu County, has stopped selling its cheese through most major retail chains, saying the retail sales system has become too costly.

properties.title: Tallinn's taxi services now predominantly app-based
properties.summary: Taxi services in Tallinn are now offered predominantly through information technology platforms, with the market share of traditional taxi services around just 5 percent.

properties.title: Tallinn's population decreases as net migration turns negative
properties.summary: For the past five years, the number of births has been lower than the number of deaths in Tallinn. In addition, net migration has now also turned negative, meaning more people are leaving the capital than moving there.

properties.title: Court rejects MEP's campaign expenses challenge
properties.summary: Tallinn Administrative Court has dismissed European Parliament member Jaak Madison's appeal seeking to overturn an order by the Political Parties Financing Surveillance Committee requiring him to repay campaign expenses.

properties.title: Photos: Trolleybus services return to Tallinn
properties.summary: Trolleybuses have reappeared on the streets of Tallinn after a break of over a year and a half, with service restored on Wednesday.

properties.title: Minister: Police conducting raids near schools to catch e‑scooter offenders
properties.summary: Estonian police have conducted raids near schools in Tallinn suburbs to curb rising e-scooter accidents among 7–14-year-olds, the only demographic seeing increased injuries during the first five months of 2026.

properties.title: Eesti kitarrist soojendab: selgunud on Moby kontserdi külalisesinejad
properties.summary: Elektroonilise muusika superstaar Moby esineb 6. augustil Tartu laululaval. Nüüd on selgunud oodatud suvekontserdi külalisesinejad, nende seas üks meie hinnatumaid kitarriste.

properties.title: Esimese restorani edukalt käivitanud ettevõtja lükkab miljon eurot järgmisse
properties.summary: Tallinnas Rotermanni kvartalis edukalt LaBocca restorani käima tõmmanud ettevõtja Gert Kerde võtab ette järgmise koha Telliskivis, investeerides uude kohta miljon eurot.
